headline: Can PayPal’s AI Reset And Reorganization Revive Long Term Growth Potential
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is rolling out an AI focused overhaul, including the launch of PayPal Ads ID for commerce based ad targeting. The company is introducing Store Sync for BigCommerce to connect merchants to AI driven shopping channels. Leadership changes and a reorganization into three business units are reshaping how PayPal runs its payments, advertising and merchant connectivity operations. These moves arrive after a difficult run for NasdaqGS:PYPL, with the share price at...
